required_contains.text: There is also a lower protocol floor for stake and unstake amounts. The constants reference lists
`api.consts.subtensorModule.initialMinStake` as `2000000`, and the custom-error reference describes
`StakeAmountTooLow` as the error for amounts below 2,000,000 RAO, equal to 0.002 TAO. That smaller
transaction floor is separate from the 0.1 TAO nominator minimum above
